title: Rákóczi nótája
actors: Klári Tolnay, János Sárdy, Károly Kovács
plot: Krisztinka Oltay, disguised as a gypsy woman, spies, plots and arranges to help Prince Rákóczi and free his lover, Péter Szakmáry, who has been captured by his brother, who is loyal to the Emperor, and is to be executed in Kassa w...
